screenshots.screenshot_status: skipped — browser tool unavailable in CI environment

card_parchment_background.detail: linear-gradient(145deg, #1a1209, #2d1f0e, #1a1209) confirmed in .card-container. No white backgrounds remain.

card_gold_border.detail: border: 2px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.45) + ::before/::after corner accents at 8px inset. Gold color #c9a84c matches design spec.

card_serif_font.detail: .card-narrative and .verb use Georgia serif. Fallback to Times New Roman then system serif.

card_no_white.detail: All white backgrounds removed from card. Overlay background is rgba(5,4,8,0.92).

tooltip_z_index.detail: .effect-tooltip z-index:50 > .card-option. Mobile fallback: below button via @media (max-width:700px).

faction_dots.detail: buildFactionDot() maps druides/#6abf69, niamh/#8ab4f8, korrigans/#b888e8, anciens/#e8c84c, ankou/#e05c5c. Neutral options: no dot.

biome_badge.detail: card-biome-badge injected top-right of .card-container each showCard() call. Biome underscores replaced with spaces.

hud_present.detail: HUD structure unchanged. Life bar, cards-count, biome-name all present.

ambient_audio_leak.detail: stopAmbient() disconnects masterGain after 1.6s fade. ambientSession set to null before teardown. Bird timer cleared before fade. No dangling references.

severity_findings.item: card-container has two CSS blocks (T067 redesign + T047 flip animation perspective). The flip block only adds perspective:1000px which cascades cleanly — no conflict.

overall: All 4 tasks implemented. No regressions detected in code review. No white scenes. No missing UI.
